# opnsense_quagga_static_route (Data Source)

Configure static routes for Quagga.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID of the resource.

### Read-Only

- `bfd` (Boolean) Enable BFD tracking for this static route.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this static route.
- `gateway` (String) The gateway IP address for this static route.
- `interface_name` (String) The interface used for this static route.
- `network` (String) The destination network in CIDR notation.
